response_text:
To find out how many minutes it will take for the fog bank to cover the whole city, you can follow these steps:

1.  **Determine how many 3-mile segments are in the 42-mile city:**
    $42 \text{ miles} \div 3 \text{ miles} = 14 \text{ segments}$

2.  **Multiply the number of segments by the time it takes per segment:**
    $14 \text{ segments} \times 10 \text{ minutes} = 140 \text{ minutes}$

**Answer:** It will take **140 minutes** for the fog bank to cover the whole city.
